items.title: US and Iran trade fire as tensions rise over Strait of Hormuz
items.dek: Within hours of fresh US attacks, Iran said it had struck US military bases in Kuwait, Jordan and Bahrain.
items.body: Within hours of fresh US attacks, Iran said it had struck US military bases in Kuwait, Jordan and Bahrain.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Planes sent to tackle wildfires of 'exceptional scale' near Paris
items.dek: It was the first time firefighting planes had been sent up from the normally drier and hotter south of the country to tackle fires in the Paris region.
items.body: It was the first time firefighting planes had been sent up from the normally drier and hotter south of the country to tackle fires in the Paris region.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Dybantsa nets 23 in potential summer league finale...
items.dek: In what could be his last game of summer league, No. 1 pick AJ Dybantsa scored 23 points to go along with seven rebounds, helping the Washington Wizards remain
items.body: In what could be his last game of summer league, No. 1 pick AJ Dybantsa scored 23 points to go along with seven rebounds, helping the Washington Wizards remain undefeated with a 104-85 victory over the Sacramento Kings Sunday night in Las Vegas.
items.author: IriLine Desk
